query: heavy lens flare sun glare washout veil photograph haze
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: lens flare overload — sun glare, washout, hexagonal flare artifacts, veiled hazy aesthetic

response.objective_caption: A bright, round celestial body emits a strong yellow-white glow against a predominantly black sky, intersected by two thin diagonal bands of clouds or contrails. Faint warm light illuminates a narrow band of lower clouds near the bottom of the frame, while the rest of the scene remains in deep shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The photograph uses intentional blur and soft focus to render a bright moon or sun as a diffused, glowing orb behind two diagonal contrails or cloud bands in a dark sky. Muted, faded sepia-brown tones drain the image of vibrancy, causing atmospheric textures to appear washed-out and indistinct as they dissolve into the black surroundings.
